name: Phase 10 No-code tenant customization requirements matrix

rows.requirement: TenantConfiguration root, versions, and publish lifecycle
evidence: P10 contract defines the TenantConfiguration root/version lifecycle and exit criteria before implementation.

packages/tenant-config/src/index.ts now extends TenantConfiguration with version refs for process templates, access profiles, KPI definitions, control surfaces, action definitions, custom fields, saved views, and feature flags.

packages/tenant-config/src/index.ts implements previewTenantConfigurationPublish and publishTenantConfigurationPreview. Preview is non-mutating; publish archives the previous active version, activates the draft, requires auditEventId, validates stale preview/tenant mismatch, and returns audit evidence.

packages/tenant-config/src/tenantConfigurationVersion.test.ts proves non-mutating preview, publish with audit evidence, stale preview rejection, draft-ref change after preview rejection, tenant mismatch rejection, missing audit rejection, duplicate ref rejection, and source immutability.

packages/access-control/src/index.ts adds P10 tenant configuration permission constants for read/write/export/import; packages/access-control/src/accessProfile.test.ts proves they compose into an access profile.

rows.cleanup: Domain-only P10-001 changes are pure deterministic in-memory functions with no runtime state to clean up. Phase row remains blocked until later API/UI/E2E fixture reset proves configuration-version cleanup/readback for E2E-090 and E2E-095.
rows.blocker: Domain foundation is implemented and package tests pass, but P10-001 remains blocked for phase verification until API/UI runtime readback and E2E-090/E2E-095 evidence prove labels/runtime stability through the browser and fixture cleanup.

rows.requirement: Role/label/stage builder and runtime label projection
evidence: P10 contract defines label/role/stage builder scope and runtime projection requirements before implementation.

packages/tenant-config/src/index.ts implements previewTenantLabelSetPublish and publishTenantLabelSetPreview. Preview is non-mutating, rejects unknown/duplicate stable keys, returns before/after runtime surface impact, and publish requires fresh preview plus auditEventId.

apps/api/src/phase10Runtime.ts and apps/api/src/app.ts expose GET /api/tenant/labels, POST /api/tenant/labels/preview, POST /api/tenant/labels/publish, and GET /api/tenant/configuration/audit. API tests prove readback, preview without mutation, governed publish, audit/action evidence, read-only denial, Tenant B no-leak stale denial, invalid-key rejection, and no partial mutation.

apps/web/src/TenantLabelsAdminSurface.tsx and apps/web/src/tenantLabelsApiClient.ts implement a Russian admin control surface for role/stage labels with API readback, dry-run preview, publish command, refreshed runtime projection, read-only/audit states, and stale-preview recovery. Component tests prove success only after post-mutation readback.
apps/web/src/App.tsx wires TenantLabelsAdminSurface into the app shell and refreshes current tenant configuration labels/version after publish.

rows.cleanup: API/runtime label previews are deterministic in-memory state. /test-fixtures/reset recreates Phase 10 runtime and Phase 2 label sets, restoring label-set versions and runtime projections. Browser-level reset/readback remains to be proven by P10-009 E2E-090.

evidence: P10 contract defines process template builder MVP and active-runtime stability boundaries before implementation.

packages/project-core/src/index.ts implements previewProcessTemplatePublish and publishProcessTemplatePreview for non-mutating draft preview, stale preview/version rejection, active-stage safety validation, immutable active-project version readback, and audited publish result.

apps/api/src/phase10Runtime.ts and apps/api/src/app.ts expose GET /api/tenant/process-templates, POST /api/tenant/process-templates/preview, and POST /api/tenant/process-templates/publish through governed Phase 10 runtime commands. Publish requires tenant.config.write and project.template.write, writes audit/action evidence, refreshes the Phase 4 active process-template runtime, and updates Phase 3 future CRM intake template binding.

apps/web/src/ProcessTemplateBuilderSurface.tsx and apps/web/src/processTemplateBuilderApiClient.ts implement the Russian process-template builder control surface with API readback, dry-run preview, publish command, refreshed active-template/audit evidence, read-only state, stale-preview recovery, and no local-only success state.

apps/api/src/phase10ProcessTemplateApi.test.ts proves preview does not mutate, publish creates audit/action/readback evidence, read-only users cannot preview/apply, Tenant B cannot use Tenant A preview ids, invalid no-active-stage drafts fail without partial mutation, stale previews fail, future CRM draft creation uses the new template version, and new projects use the published stage label while existing active projects keep their old process-template snapshot.

Browser-level reload/reset readback remains to be proven by P10-009 E2E-090/E2E-095.

rows.requirement: Custom field builder and control-surface binding
evidence: P10 contract defines custom field builder, validation, runtime value, and control-surface binding before implementation.

packages/tenant-config/src/index.ts implements previewCustomFieldDefinitionPublish and publishCustomFieldDefinitionPreview. Preview is non-mutating, supports project custom fields only for this MVP, validates select options, required control-surface bindings, duplicate target/key, stale previews, and emits publish audit data.

packages/project-core/src/index.ts adds tenant-scoped typed project custom-field values on ManagedProject plus setProjectCustomFieldValue/listProjectCustomFieldValues. Tests prove typed select validation, tenant/target guard, source immutability, deterministic replacement, and audit/correlation metadata.

packages/control-surfaces/src/index.ts adds bindCustomProjectFieldsToControlSurfaceDefinition so active project custom fields become visible control-surface fields only when binding flags and visibility rules allow the target surface.

apps/api/src/phase10Runtime.ts, apps/api/src/phase4Runtime.ts, apps/api/src/phase8Runtime.ts, and apps/api/src/app.ts expose GET /api/tenant/custom-fields, POST /api/tenant/custom-fields/preview, POST /api/tenant/custom-fields/publish, PUT /api/projects/:projectId/custom-fields/:fieldKey, portfolio control readback with custom project values, and configuration audit/action evidence.

apps/api/src/phase10CustomFieldsApi.test.ts proves registry read model, preview without mutation, governed publish, project value write, portfolio control readback, configuration audit/action evidence, read-only direct API denial, Tenant B publish/value no-leak denial, per-definition write permission enforcement, invalid definition rejection, invalid value rejection, and no partial mutation.

apps/web/src/CustomFieldBuilderSurface.tsx and apps/web/src/customFieldBuilderApiClient.ts implement the Russian custom-field builder control surface with TanStack Query server state, preview-before-publish, publish readback, project value write, portfolio-surface readback, audit/result evidence, read-only state, API error state, and stale-preview recovery.

rows.requirement: KPI threshold builder and future evaluation impact
evidence: P10 contract defines KPI threshold builder and historical evaluation stability requirements before implementation.

packages/kpi-engine/src/index.ts implements previewKpiThresholdRuleSetPublish and publishKpiThresholdRuleSetPreview for non-mutating threshold impact preview, versioned future threshold publication, stale preview rejection, invalid threshold rejection, affected runtime surface trace, and publish audit metadata.

apps/api/src/phase10Runtime.ts stores tenant-scoped KPI threshold previews/action executions and requires preview confirmation before publish. apps/api/src/app.ts exposes GET /api/tenant/kpi-thresholds, POST /api/tenant/kpi-thresholds/preview, POST /api/tenant/kpi-thresholds/publish, and configuration audit readback.

apps/api/src/phase7Runtime.ts supports replacing the active threshold rule set for future evaluations while existing KpiEvaluation records keep their original thresholdRuleSetVersion and matched rule trace.

apps/api/src/phase10KpiThresholdsApi.test.ts proves API read model, preview without mutation, governed publish, future evaluation severity/version impact, historical evaluation stability, audit/action evidence, read-only direct API denial, Tenant B no-leak stale denial, invalid threshold rejection, and no partial mutation.

apps/web/src/KpiThresholdBuilderSurface.tsx and apps/web/src/kpiThresholdBuilderApiClient.ts implement the Russian KPI threshold builder control surface with TanStack Query server state, current threshold readback, impact preview, publish command, API refetch/readback, audit/result evidence, read-only state, error state, and stale-preview recovery.

rows.requirement: Saved views and control-surface layout builder MVP
evidence: P10 contract defines saved view and control-surface layout builder MVP before implementation.

packages/control-surfaces/src/index.ts implements previewControlSurfaceLayoutPublish and publishControlSurfaceLayoutPreview for non-mutating layout/saved-view preview, stale preview rejection, unavailable field/widget/action explanations, previous-version readback inputs, and audited publish metadata.

apps/api/src/phase10Runtime.ts and apps/api/src/app.ts expose GET /api/tenant/saved-views, POST /api/tenant/saved-views/preview, POST /api/tenant/saved-views/publish, configuration audit readback, and active control-surface read-model projection through the published layout definition.

apps/api/src/phase10SavedViewsApi.test.ts proves readback, preview without mutation, governed publish, refreshed control-surface readback, previous-version readability, configuration audit/action evidence, read-only direct API denial, Tenant B no-leak stale denial, stale preview rejection, and invalid layout rejection without partial mutation.

apps/web/src/SavedViewLayoutBuilderSurface.tsx and apps/web/src/savedViewLayoutBuilderApiClient.ts implement the Russian saved-view/layout builder control surface with TanStack Query server state, API readback, dry-run preview, publish command, refreshed read model, audit/result evidence, read-only state, API error state, and stale-preview recovery.

apps/web/src/SavedViewLayoutBuilderSurface.test.tsx proves the surface loads active layout, handles API error, previews without applied success state, publishes only through API readback, shows audit/action evidence, shows previous version readback, blocks read-only mutation, and recovers from stale preview errors.

evidence: P10 contract defines action enable/disable and safe form configuration boundaries before implementation.

packages/action-engine/src/index.ts implements createActionConfigurationSet, previewActionConfigurationPublish, and publishActionConfigurationPreview for tenant-scoped action availability/form config, non-mutating preview, stale preview rejection, unknown action rejection, command schema field validation, typed default validation, previous-version readback inputs, and publish audit metadata.

apps/api/src/phase10Runtime.ts and apps/api/src/app.ts expose GET /api/tenant/action-configs, POST /api/tenant/action-configs/preview, POST /api/tenant/action-configs/publish, configuration audit readback, action definition form-field projection, and direct backend denial for disabled governed actions.

apps/api/src/phase10ActionConfigsApi.test.ts proves readback, preview without mutation, governed publish, refreshed action configuration readback, control-surface action availability projection, disabled direct action preview denial, configuration audit/action evidence, read-only direct API denial, Tenant B no-leak stale denial, invalid default rejection, and no partial mutation.
